{{CargoRelic
|name=Devonian Ammonite
|class_id=20075
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Chrysolite survived from the Devonian to the Late Cretaceous and was named for the chrysanthemum-like line pattern on its surface. It existed in abundance in the oceans for 370 million years until it died out along with the dinosaurs!
|fame=13
|art=11
|fth=18
|civ=31
|tech=17
|ss1=When upgrading Bionic Part, B-tad cost -3%<br>Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss2=When upgrading Bionic Part, B-tad cost -6%<br>Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail DEF +6<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss3=When upgrading Bionic Part, B-tad cost -9%<br>Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail DEF +9<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss4=When upgrading Bionic Part, B-tad cost -9%<br>Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail DEF +9<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss7=When upgrading Bionic Part, B-tad cost -9%<br>Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail DEF +9<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
